absorption: ASK Absorption detected around 60900-61000. The previous candle had a high positive delta (+515) but failed to push the price higher, indicating sellers were absorbing the aggressive buying pressure.
dom_observation: Significant stacked offers are visible at 61050 (1108 lots) and 61100 (1139 lots), acting as strong resistance. Bids are comparatively thin, showing a lack of strong support nearby.
reasoning: Fiyat, yuksek pozitif deltaya ragmen yukselmeyi basaramadi (ASK Absorption), bu da alici gucunun tukendigini ve saticilarin kontrolu ele aldigini gosteriyor.
